basic_details.short_information: R.G. Kar Medical College, Kolkata (RGKMC) Recruitment 2026 for 7 posts of Senior Resident. Candidates with MD/MS/DNB/DrNB/DM/MCH Can apply Offline. The Walk-in on 05-06-2026. For detailed information please visit RGKMC official website.

age_limit.age_details: Not exceeding 45 years as on date of appointment.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with MD/MS/DNB/DrNB/DM/MCH in the respective discipline from a recognized university.

seo_tags: RGKMC Kolkata Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline For 07 Posts
